items.name: Brown Waffle Knit Button Polo-na-s
items.description: A Brown Waffle Knit Button Polo (often in Chocolate, Mocha, or Sand shades) is a trending menswear staple for 2025-2026. It is highly sought after for its earthy, masculine tone and its association with the "Old Money" aesthetic. The 3D waffle texture adds a layer of sophistication that flat cotton polos lack.

category.title: Waffle Polo
category.description: A Waffle Polo is a textured polo shirt defined by its three-dimensional, grid-like "honeycomb" pattern. This unique knit structure is not just for style; it creates small air pockets that enhance breathability, moisture absorption, and thermal insulation, making it suitable for both warm and cool weather.

items.name: Brown Cheque Flannel Shacket-na-m
items.description: A Brown Cheque Flannel Shacket is a functional hybrid garment that offers the structured aesthetic of a jacket with the soft, cozy feel of a flannel shirt. It is specifically designed for layering during mild winters or transitional autumn and spring weather.

category.title: Shacket
category.description: A shacket is a versatile, lightweight hybrid of a shirt and a jacket, designed for layering during transitional seasons. It features a button-down front, collar, and long sleeves with a generally oversized, casual fit. Made from materials like flannel, denim, or wool, it is perfect for casual wear.

category.title: Ladies Purse
category.description: Ladies' purses (or handbags) are essential fashion accessories designed for both style and functionality, used to carry personal items like phones, wallets, and makeup. Common types include totes, clutches, crossbodies, and shoulder bags, crafted from materials such as leather, synthetic, or fabric. Key features include secure closures (zippers, magnets), internal pockets for organization, and adjustable straps.
